final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single large knowledge card for children explaining the story of the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms period.

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large card layout with a clear title at top, cartoon story scene as the main visual, and bullet-point key facts listed alongside
Subject: must include the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) as the central subject, depicted through cartoon characters and naval battle scene
Scene/backdrop: must include a river battle scene evoking the 赤壁 setting with fire, warships, and dramatic action
Lighting/mood: needs a vivid, energetic atmosphere suitable for children — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, child-friendly direction — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "赤壁之战" as the card title (large, prominent)
Constraints: must preserve single-card format; bullet-point key facts must be clearly listed alongside the illustration; content must be age-appropriate for children
Avoid: must avoid overly dark or violent imagery; avoid adult-complexity visual style
